# sevalla_load_balancer_domain (Resource)

Manages a domain for a Sevalla load balancer.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Standard domain
resource "sevalla_load_balancer_domain" "example" {
  load_balancer_id = sevalla_load_balancer.example.id
  name             = "lb.example.com"
}

# Wildcard domain with custom SSL
resource "sevalla_load_balancer_domain" "wildcard" {
  load_balancer_id = sevalla_load_balancer.example.id
  name             = "example.com"
  is_wildcard      = true
  custom_ssl_cert  = file("certs/example.com.pem")
  custom_ssl_key   = file("certs/example.com.key")
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `load_balancer_id` (String) The ID of the load balancer this domain belongs to.
- `name` (String) The domain name.

### Optional

- `custom_ssl_cert` (String, Sensitive) Custom SSL certificate in PEM format. When provided, the platform uses this certificate instead of auto-provisioning one.
- `custom_ssl_key` (String, Sensitive) Private key for the custom SSL certificate in PEM format. Required when custom_ssl_cert is provided.
- `is_wildcard` (Boolean) Whether this should be a wildcard domain that matches all subdomains.

### Read-Only

- `cname_target` (String) The CNAME target for DNS configuration.
- `created_at` (String) The timestamp when the domain was created.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the domain is enabled.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the domain.
- `is_primary` (Boolean) Whether this is the primary domain.
- `ssl_status` (String) The SSL certificate status.
- `status` (String) The status of the domain.
- `type` (String) The domain type (custom or system).
- `updated_at` (String) The timestamp when the domain was last updated.
